MULTIPLE VEHICLES STALLED IN WATER, AND ONE DRIVER REQUIRED ASSISTANCE IN BEING EVACUATED. SOME NEIGHBORHOOD ROADS WERE TEMPORARILY CLOSED AND HAD STANDING WATER FOR HOURS. TIME ESTIMATED BASED ON RADAR AND DISPATCH REPORTS.
